task1.instructions: For questions 21–25, choose from the list A–H what each speaker says about coming into contact with a celebrity.
options: A I failed to recognise the person.
B I realised I had forgotten something.
D I was upset by personal criticism.
E I had been given incorrect information.
H I was amused by something.

task2.instructions: For questions 26–30, choose from the list A–H the opinion each speaker gives about the celebrity.
options: A He/She became more agitated than necessary.
C He/She appeared totally at ease.
D He/She expected too much privacy.
F He/She wasn’t able to cope with fame.
G He/She talked down to me.
H He/She eventually accepted the regulations.
